goal: Ensure yyds handles DeepSeek transport errors (connection reset, timeout, HTTP 5xx) with correct error classification, bounded retry/backoff, state event recording, and graceful degradation without crashing or corrupting state.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Transport error classification, retry/backoff logic, and state-event recording can silently regress when error string formats change, HTTP status handling shifts, or retry budget arithmetic is refactored — without an eval fixture the harness has no mechanical gate against these regressions.
